creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Er... what's this I spy in pkg-deinstall.in ?

rm -rf %%PREFIX%%/etc/curvedns ?

Please write some proper handling of config files into pkg-plist; 
there's guidance in the Porter's Handbook.

Chris

--
